message:
fix(sources): Path mapping separator fix and code style cleanup

1. config.rs: Fix path mapping bug where "/a/" -> "/b" would incorrectly
   map "/a/file" to "/bfile" instead of "/b/file". Now properly preserves
   separator when 'from' ends with one but 'to' does not.

2. Style cleanup: Refactor nested if-let to let-chains (Rust 2024 edition)
   in lib.rs and verify.rs. Flatten chained method calls in install.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
